arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can finally complete two-year Arsenal transfer mission - but there's a catch - football.london
arts.sum: "I know the players who entered the first team when they were 17 or 18 and played in an Ajax team that dominated the league and went far in Europe," he told The Athletic. Though it is clear Arsenal will likely remain big fans of Hato, transfer priorities appear elsewhere, and thus formally entering the race for his signature is hard to imagine, despite the expectation he departs Johan Cruyff Arena in 2025.

arts.sum: Last weekend, we covered claims from Italy which stated Manchester United will table an offer of around €30-35m plus bonuses for Patrick Dorgu. It was also said Manchester United’s interest in the 20-year-old is a concern for Napoli, who are also keen on signing the US Lecce star. During the course of the interview, Alkorta expressed his admiration for the Arsenal star. arts.ttl: Blocking, decoys and brute force: How Arsenal unleash Gabriel at corners
arts.sum: Since the start of last season, Arsenal have scored more goals from corners than any other team in the Premier League. It was the 20th goal that Arsenal have scored from a corner in the Premier League since the start of last season, five more than any other side in that span.
